title: Ulterior Motives
description: A mod that gives Invisibility real power, and side effects.
body:
🪞 Ulterior Motives 🗡️

A mod that gives Invisibility real power, and side effects.

Links

- 💾 GitHub Repository (in progress) – source code. - 🪲 Issues – report bugs.

Overview

Ulterior Motives is a mod that twists the concept of invisibility and identity in Minecraft. It changes how invisibility works, introduces cursed enchantments, and adds tools for uncovering the unseen.

Changed Invisibility Behavior

  • No potion particles when the player is invisible (toggleable)
  • Mobs will not detect invisible players at all (toggleable)

Enchantments

🪞 Curse of Masking (Helmet Enchantment)

Rarely found in Ancient Cities. Only works if the helmet has no other enchantments.

This curse erases your identity:

  • Your name is censored with obfuscated text (toggleable)
  • You disappear from the server player list (TAB)
  • Join and leave messages are hidden
  • If invisible, your chat name is censored (toggleable)
  • Your skin is overridden (adds a cape if you don’t have one)
  • Your nameplate above your head is censored

Examples:

  • Chat Censorship
  • TAB Removal
  • Skin Override (Front & Back)
  • Label Censorship

🔭 Trailwatching (Spyglass Enchantment)

Found in Pillager Outpost chests.

Reveals invisible entities. While using a spyglass, footprints slowly appear beneath them with a short delay.

Additional Features

  • If a player doesn’t have OP, they cannot use any commands (toggleable)

Without OP:

With OP:

Notes

- Includes a server-side config file to tweak all features. - Supports Enchancement. - Incompatible with Wavey Capes. - Currently incompatible with Chrysalia (Moonveil Mantle).
